patterns.card_creation: Use `bop new implement <id> --team <team>` to create cards in pending/ with auto-assigned glyphs
patterns.spec_format: Each spec.md should have Overview, Requirements, Scope, and Acceptance Criteria sections

existing_implementations.description: Card creation via bop-cli/src/cards.rs create_card() function

watchpaths-dispatcher.description: Extend dispatcher WatchPaths to cover all team-*/pending dirs

jj-gitignore-audit.description: Audit all large files that break jj snapshot, add to .gitignore

bop-serve.description: HTTP endpoint that accepts spec body and creates a card

bop-doctor-checks.description: Expand bop doctor to check nu/jj versions, adapter availability, launchd status

e2e-factory-test.description: Test that bop factory install + drop card → dispatcher → card moves to done/

adapter-stress-test.description: Run 10 cards concurrently through ollama adapter, verify no races

model-routing.description: Route cards to cheap (haiku) vs capable (sonnet/opus) based on cost field
